landing.heroTitle: Your files, your cloud. Fast, secure, and simple.
landing.heroDescription: A modern cloud storage solution with real-time file management, secure authentication, instant previews, and smart organization — all in one clean interface.
landing.scopeHeading: Everything you need, nothing you don't
landing.scopeDescription: Core features for a complete cloud storage experience.
landing.ctaDescription: Create your free account and start organizing your files in the cloud today.
landing.footerCopy: Cloud File Storage. Open source project.
landing.scopeItem1: File manager with folder navigation, search, sorting, trash and storage quotas.
landing.scopeItem2: Secure authentication, email verification, password recovery and account security.
landing.scopeItem3: Instant file previews for images, PDFs, documents and text files.

pillars.workflowDescription: Drag and drop uploads, folder structure, trash, instant previews and storage quotas — everything in one fluid interface.
pillars.authDescription: Login, registration, email verification, password reset and account security — all protected with industry-standard encryption.
pillars.integrationDescription: View images, PDFs, documents and text files directly in your browser without downloading.

login.title: Sign in to your account
login.description: Enter your email and password to access your files.
login.twoFactorIntro: Two-factor protection is enabled for {email}. Enter the code from your authenticator app or use a backup code.
login.verifiedNotice: Email verified. You can sign in now.
login.passwordResetNotice: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Sign up to start storing and managing your files in the cloud.
register.name: Name

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.resetInfo: Reset password for {email}. Use the secure link from your email to complete the change.
resetPassword.saveAndBack: Save and return to sign in
resetPassword.missingToken: This page requires a valid reset link. Please use the link from your password reset email.
resetPassword.passwordMismatch: Passwords must match before the reset request can be sent.
resetPassword.success: Password updated successfully. Sign in with your new password.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.description: Confirm your email address to activate your account.
verifyEmail.missingToken: Open this page from your verification email to complete confirmation.
verifyEmail.loginNotice: Email verified. You can sign in now.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

files.searchPlaceholder: Search across all files and folders
files.searchResultsSummary: Search for "{query}" returned {count} result(s). Open a folder result to exit search.
files.selectionMovedHint: Moving: {name}. Drop onto folder or breadcrumbs to change parent.
files.emptyDescription: Create a folder, drag files here, or use search to find what you need.

preview.pdfDescription: View your PDF document directly in the browser.
preview.documentDescription: Text extracted from the document is shown below.
preview.documentEmpty: This document doesn't contain any readable text.
preview.unavailableDescription: No preview is available for this file type. You can download the file to view it.
preview.errorFallback: Preview could not be loaded. You can download the file instead.

uploadZone.title: Upload files
uploadZone.compactDescription: Drop files here or click to upload.
uploadZone.description: Drag and drop files here, or click to browse your computer.

trash.title: Trash
trash.description: Items moved to trash stay here until you restore them or delete them permanently.
trash.emptyDescription: Deleted files and folders appear here until they are restored or removed permanently.

security.title: Account security
security.description: Manage your account email status and password recovery from one place.
security.emailDescription: Verify your email address to secure your account.
security.passwordDescription: Request a password reset link sent to your email.
security.verifyFailed: Unable to send verification email right now. Please try again later.

billing.title: Storage plans
billing.description: Choose the plan that fits your storage needs.
billing.successMessage: Plan updated successfully. New quota is now active.
billing.downgradeBlocked: Cannot downgrade: you're currently using {used} which exceeds the {limit} limit.
